textByHash.36fa71b884b71cebf83e97b8f97d96b2b284991c: Thish here'sh a shtore room right?
textByHash.7219e2e854745447a074e931559f7318d76930a5: That'sh what I shaid! A shtore room.... Now technic'ly shpeaking, I should be outshide guarding it...
textByHash.377066a886c08a6a6afd5b01119fbdc895b24362: Yer very very shtrange. But.... you pick the keg up, and balance it on yer head, then you pick another keg up and put that on top. S'really very eashy.
textByHash.2cd16e07daeff83a0c00b4425ae843f9d7c46846: But you couldn't ever balansh ash many ash meee!
textByHash.b572986d909bc7827eefbc06464fced5127b741d: Wha'? You ain't earnt any mate!
textByHash.89adbd0f3ac9096320e50b2f04b615b975516ed0: Well... err.. ish not offishal or anyfin... but I got the ledger of tokensh 'ere. I'll jus' err.. write it in!
textByHash.2a5c46d991e74e0dbd60f6f21766ab1b007c7421: Nah... hic.... I'm a wizsh at copyin' signaturesh! Jus' ashk an offishal mem'er of shtaff like Shloane fer yer tokensh.
textByHash.0fe6aeeec0692f2e917cbc401841d3d015d6af70: Shure you wouldn't like an ickle drinkie fore yer go?
textByHash.5e906ede82136b2830e7bcea655639a7e2bc85f4: Ya got no chance o' beatin' me !
textByHash.c1959c240a1cf5909456776aafa2ee6e00a39750: No one's stronger than me, 'speshly not !
textByHash.b49a8fa944ec9e44b82e8479bf41d423168a122b: Wow! That'sh bery impr....imp...impresh.... good ! Equalsh my record!
